title: Slovakian Lemongrass Chicken Noodles
description: A comforting Slovakian dish featuring lemongrass and al-dente noodles, with a bitter and shattering flavor profile, friendly to sugar-free diets.
instructions: Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the bruised lemongrass to the pot and reduce heat to a simmer.
Let the lemongrass steep for 10 minutes, then remove it from the pot.
Add the coconut oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper to the pot and stir to combine.
Add the chicken to the pot and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the noodles to the pot and cook until they are al-dente.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it cool slightly.
Serve the noodles and chicken hot, garnished with additional lemongrass if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
